_comment: Session-curated bridge pairs (code mines candidates via pipelines/mine_bridges.py, session curates here — same division of labor as data/subthemes.json). Verified at EXPORT time against price co-movement (skg/analyze/comovement.verify_bridge_pairs): z is the pair's residual corr vs the same/cross-sector baseline. Only cross-sector z>=3 ships as a graph edge; everything evaluated ships in the evidence list.
